lessonStart: Hi, {name}! Ready for a new lesson? 💪
{name}, today we'll cover lesson {level}! Let's make it count! 🎯
Let's begin, {name}! Remember: accuracy beats speed ✨
tooManyErrors: Hey, slow down! Better slow and correct 🎯
{name}, ease off a bit. Accuracy first!
lessonCompleteSuccess: {name}, you nailed it! Ready for the next one? 🚀
errorLimitExceeded: Oops, {name}! Too many errors ({errors} of {limit}). Try again? 💪
Don't worry, {name}. Let's do it again, more carefully 🎯
{name}, you almost had it! Focus and retry ✨
levelUnlocked: {name}, you made it! New level is waiting! 🚀
Great work, {name}! Ready for new challenges? ⭐
weakKeysDetected: {name}, I notice the '{key}' key is tricky for you. Want extra practice?
Looks like '{key}' is your weak spot. Let's drill it! 💪
breakReminder: {name}, you've been practising 25 minutes! Take a break 🧘
Time to rest, {name}! A 5-minute pause will help ✨
longAbsence: Long time no see, {name}! Glad you're back! Brush up your skills? 😊
{name}, welcome back! Ready to continue the path to mastery? 💪
welcome: Hi, {name}! I'm Anna — your personal typing mentor. I see you have {keyboardType} — I'll factor that into my tips! Ready to start your journey to touch-typing mastery? Remember: accuracy beats speed! 🎯
